title: STATUS 2400W Ontario Steam Iron, Ceramic Soleplate Clothes Iron, Variable Continuous and Burst Steam, White Aqua, (ONTARIOIRON1PKB4)
features: FAST 2400W CERAMIC HEAT Ceramic soleplate reaches ironing temperature in under thirty seconds, delivering up to thirty five grams per minute of continuous steam so cotton shirts and bed linen smooth out quickly on busy mornings.

POWERFUL SHOT FEATURE Press the trigger for a ninety gram burst that removes stubborn folds in denim curtains or upholstery, and use the same jet vertically to freshen suit jackets and hanging drapes without an ironing board.

VARIABLE CONTROL Dial sets fabric temperature and steam slider adjusts moisture level so delicate silks stay safe and heavy jeans receive deeper penetration, giving one appliance that handles every garment in the weekly wash basket.

EASY CLEAN CERAMIC GLIDE Scratch resistant pearl ceramic plate glides over zips sequins and prints and wipes clean with a cloth while the self clean function flushes limescale to keep steam vents clear in hard water areas.

SAFE USER FRIENDLY DESIGN Auto shut off cuts power if left idle or tipped, one point nine metre swivel cord prevents tangles, and the three hundred millilitre tank fills through a wide mouth that stops drips on carpets and boards.
description: Product Description Lift wrinkles with speed and accuracy using the STATUS Ontario Steam Iron. Its high efficiency element draws 2400W, heating the ceramic soleplate in seconds and maintaining an even temperature while channels feed a steady thirty five gram steam output. For deep creases a single trigger releases a focused ninety gram shot that also works upright, refreshing curtains and suits without removing them from hangers. A simple selector wheel pairs with a variable steam slider to match any fibre from delicate silk to sturdy denim, and the pearl ceramic plate glides smoothly across buttons and embroidery. Built in auto shut off provides peace of mind if the iron is left unattended, while a swivel cord and large 280 millilitre reservoir make long sessions easier. With self clean maintenance and cool running storage heel, the Ontario model brings professional results to home laundry with less effort and lower energy waste. Box Contains 1 x Status Ontario 2200w Steam Iron
